text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the day off.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I did. I went for a nice, long run in a place I had
been meaning to visit for a long while.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That might also be why my legs feel so light
today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Silence Suzuka has managed to
adequately refresh both her body and mind.
